scripts.dev: npm run dev -w frontend & npm run dev -w backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:watch -w frontend && npm run test:watch -w backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w frontend && npm run test:coverage -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w frontend && npm run lint:fix -w backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w frontend && npm run type-check -w backend
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w frontend && npm run clean -w backend
